nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rosoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Miguel, Asencio, Edgardo, Estela, Francisco, Jaime, Jorge, Mercedes.
Spanish: probably of Italian origin, an altered form of   Rossi  .

variants.name: Rossi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Rocco, Aldo, Gino, Luigi, Carlo, Carmine, Domenic, Pasquale, Salvatore, Dino.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Rosso  . This is the commonest surname in Italy. It is also found in Spain (mainly Cádiz). Compare   De Rossi  ,   Rossey  ,   Rossie  , and   Rossy  .
American shortened form (and Greek feminine form, denoting ‘the daughter, or wife of’) of Greek Rossis: of Italian origin (see 1 above), although usually assumed to be related to Rhōssos ‘Russian’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Rosoy was born in 1180, his father, Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy, was 50 and his mother, Julienne de Rumigny, de Florennes, was 25. He married Adelaïde d'Avesnes in 1236. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died about 1246, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Rosoy est né en 1180, son père, Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Julienne de Rumigny, de Florennes, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Adelaïde d'Avesnes en 1236. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1246, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Rosoy 1180 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy 50 und seine Mutter Julienne de Rumigny, de Florennes 25. Er hat 1236 Adelaïde d'Avesnes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1246 im Alter von 67 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Rosoy è nato il nel 1180, il suo padre, Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy, aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Julienne de Rumigny, de Florennes, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Adelaïde d'Avesnes nel 1236. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1246, all'età di 67 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Rosoy(이)가 1180년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Julienne de Rumigny, de Florennes(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1236년 Adelaïde d'Avesnes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1246년 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Rosoy nasceu em 1180, seu pai, Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Julienne de Rumigny, de Florennes, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaïde d'Avesnes em 1236. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1246, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Rosoy родился в 1180 г., его отцу по имени Reinauld Clarenbout Gerard van Rosoy было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Julienne de Rumigny, de Florennes, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaïde d'Avesnes в 1236 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1246 г. в возрасте 67 лет.
